nodes.label: Note On
nodes.description: MIDI note-on triggers startVoice(), which stores the HiseEvent and reads the initial slot value

nodes.label: Store HiseEvent
nodes.description: Captures the voice's HiseEvent in per-voice state for use in subsequent block calculations

nodes.label: SlotIndex
nodes.description: Selects which event data slot (0-15) to read from AdditionalEventStorage

nodes.label: DefaultValue
nodes.description: Fallback value (0-1) used when the event data slot has not been written

nodes.label: SmoothingTime
nodes.description: Linear ramp time in milliseconds (0-2000) for smoothing value transitions. 0 = instant.

nodes.label: Poll Event Data Slot
nodes.description: Every audio block: reads AdditionalEventStorage.getValue(eventId, slotIndex). Returns the current value or triggers defaultValue fallback.

nodes.label: AdditionalEventStorage
nodes.description: Shared storage (via GlobalRoutingManager) holding per-event-ID data slots. Written by scripts, read by this modulator.

nodes.label: Target Changed?
nodes.description: Compares polled value to rampValue.targetValue. If different, initiates a new linear ramp.

nodes.label: Ramp Active?
nodes.description: Checks if the linear ramp has remaining steps (stepsToDo > 0)

nodes.label: Linear Ramp (per-sample)
nodes.description: Per-sample linear interpolation: value += delta each sample until target reached

nodes.label: Constant Fill
nodes.description: SIMD-optimized fill of internalBuffer with the current constant value (no ramp needed)

nodes.label: internalBuffer
nodes.description: The modulation output buffer, consumed by applyTimeModulation() to modulate the voice signal

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Final modulation signal applied to the parent voice buffer via multiply or add (depending on Modulation::Mode)
